postconditions: result == (observed_address_code == ICP_QUERY_PRECOMPILE_ADDRESS_CODE && returned_success <= 1 && (input_len > MAX_ICP_QUERY_COMBINED_LEN_WITH_EXACT_GAS || reply_len > MAX_ICP_QUERY_COMBINED_LEN_WITH_EXACT_GAS || charged_gas >= ICP_QUERY_BASE_GAS + input_len * ICP_QUERY_INPUT_BYTE_GAS + reply_len * ICP_QUERY_REPLY_BYTE_GAS) && (returned_success != 1 || gas_limit >= charged_gas) && (returned_success != 0 || gas_limit < charged_gas))
acceptance_criteria: Require the ICP query precompile address, 0/1 success flag, exact combined input/reply byte gas lower bound in the conservative non-overflow range, and gas-limit success split.

test_evidence.command: cargo test -p verified-core && cargo test -p ic-evm-core wrap_precompile_query
test_evidence.test_name: verified-core gas observation PBT plus async ICP query precompile return/failure tests
